tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows marked renal impairment (significantly elevated creatinine), mild anemia (slightly low hematocrit), and increased platelet distribution width, which may indicate platelet activation or heterogeneity. Other parameters, including glucose, electrolytes, and blood counts, are within normal limits. Renal function requires urgent clinical attention and further evaluation.

display.value: Proteinuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Microalbuminuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus
Acute ST segment elevation myocardial infarction
